settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.large_numbers_desc: Enlarges the digits in the grid for better readability
settings.highlight_identical_desc: Highlights cells with the same value
settings.highlight_group_desc: Colors the area around the selected cell
settings.limit_errors_desc: Ends the game when the maximum number of errors is reached

hints.naked_single: Cell {{cell}} — all values from 1 to 9 are eliminated by {{row}}, {{col}} and the {{box}}… except {{n}}. It's the only possibility for this cell.
hints.hidden_single_row: Look at {{row}}: digit {{n}} can only go in cell {{cell}}. All other cells in this row are either filled or incompatible with {{n}}.
hints.hidden_single_col: Look at {{col}}: digit {{n}} can only go in cell {{cell}}. All other cells in this column are either filled or incompatible with {{n}}.
hints.hidden_single_box: In the {{box}}: digit {{n}} can only go in cell {{cell}}. The other cells in this box are incompatible with {{n}}.
hints.pointing_pair_row: In the {{box}}, all possible positions for {{n}} are on {{row}}. So {{n}} cannot appear elsewhere on this row, outside the box. Find where this forces {{n}} on the rest of {{row}}.
hints.pointing_pair_col: In the {{box}}, all possible positions for {{n}} are on {{col}}. So {{n}} cannot appear elsewhere in this column, outside the box. Find where this forces {{n}} on the rest of {{col}}.
hints.fallback_two: Cell {{cell}} has only two possibilities: {{a}} or {{b}}. Analyze {{row}}, {{col}} and the {{box}} to determine which is correct.
hints.fallback: Cell {{cell}} is one of the most constrained in the grid ({{n}} possibilities). Focus on {{row}}, {{col}} and the {{box}}.

welcome.title: GGWP
welcome.p1: This mobile game is brought to you by GGWP, and this brief advertisement will be the only one you will ever see during your entire experience on this app.
welcome.p2: GGWP's mission is to offer quality mobile games — free, ad-free, and without collecting any of your personal data. This Sudoku is the first of many. If you are tired of apps that bombard you with ads, monetise your data, or push you to pay, you are in the right place. We will keep you informed when new games become available.
welcome.p4: Thank you for taking the time to read this. Enjoy the game!
